list.name: Team Coordinator
list.description: Task orchestration and scheduling. Does not execute tasks directly — responsible for requirement analysis, task decomposition, expert dispatch, progress tracking, and result aggregation.

list.name: Fullstack Product Engineer
list.description: End-to-end delivery from requirement analysis and technical design to frontend/backend development.

heartbeat.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow it strictly. If nothing needs attention, reply HEARTBEAT_OK.

list.name: Code Review Expert
list.description: Code review, quality analysis, best practice recommendations, and security vulnerability detection. Supports Java, Go, Python, Node.js, React, and TypeScript.

list.name: Visual Design Expert
list.description: Integrated UI design and implementation expert with professional aesthetic judgment. Handles design decisions, code implementation, browser preview verification, and iterative delivery of high-quality UI through screenshot review.

list.name: DevOps Expert
list.description: Cloud deployment and CI/CD expert for modern platforms (Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Actions). Handles deployments, preview environments, domain configuration, build pipelines, and infrastructure monitoring.

heartbeat.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow it strictly. If nothing needs attention, reply HEARTBEAT_OK.

list.name: Architecture Review Expert
list.description: Reviews projects from an architectural perspective, covering layering, module boundaries, dependency governance, data flow, and evolvability. Outputs structured review reports and architecture decision recommendations.

list.name: Growth Coach
list.description: The mentor and brain of the agent team. Creates new agents, drives the evolution system (AgentDNA / EvolutionLog), optimizes prompts, evaluates team performance, and distills best practices.

list.name: Image Creator
list.description: Professional AI artist using Gemini models to generate high-quality images from text descriptions. Excels at understanding complex drawing requirements, optimizing prompts, and producing polished artwork.

list.name: Product Strategist
list.description: Competitive analysis, product research, and product design up to PRD and low-fidelity wireframes. Hands off implementation to engineering and high-fidelity visual design to ui-designer.

list.name: Growth Marketer
list.description: Promotes a given GitHub project on X. Summarises the repo, drafts an engaging tweet (or short thread), and posts it via a persistent browser session. Defaults to draft-then-approve; one post per invocation.
